summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Weekly Reports feature for Automotive Lubricant Stock Management app. Backend API tests (17/17 passed) and frontend UI tests (all core features verified working).

issues: data-testid attributes present in code but not rendered to DOM in React Native web - this is expected behavior for Expo web apps

seed_data_creation: None - used existing transaction data in database (97 entries from Feb 20 and Feb 22)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports feature fully functional. Backend endpoints /api/owner/weekly-report and /api/owner/daily-report/{date} working correctly with proper access control (403 for manager). Frontend shows weekly summary cards (Total Entries, Active Users, Active Days), Activity by User breakdown, Day-by-Day Breakdown with clickable days, and expandable transaction details.

weekly_report_summary.details: Shows Total Entries (97), Active Users (2: Owner, Factory Manager), Active Days (2: Feb 20, Feb 22)

day_by_day_breakdown.details: Shows last 7 days with correct entry counts (57 on Feb 22, 40 on Feb 20)

daily_detail_view.details: Clicking a day loads daily transactions grouped by user (Owner: 13 actions visible)

transaction_expand_details.details: Each transaction shows type label (Sale via Transport), time (13:44), and expands to show details (Product, Quantity, Sale Type, Prev Factory/Car)

print_button.details: Print button visible in header with printer icon

backend_weekly_report_structure.details: Returns period, summary (total_transactions, by_type, by_user, by_date), and transactions array

backend_daily_report_structure.details: Returns date, total_transactions, by_user with transaction details (id, type, type_label, time, data)

access_control.details: Manager gets 403 Forbidden when accessing weekly or daily reports - only owner role has access
